name: esp32s3_suite
notes: Full 12-test hardware suite for ESP32-S3 dual-USB devkit. Self-contained loopback, no external instrument. Requires 6 jumpers: GPIO4‚ÜîGPIO5 (PCNT+INTR), GPIO6‚ÜîGPIO7 (UART1), GPIO2‚ÜíGPIO1 (ADC), GPIO11‚ÜîGPIO13 (SPI MOSI‚ÜîMISO), GPIO8‚ÜîGPIO15 (I2C SDA), GPIO9‚ÜîGPIO16 (I2C SCL). Flash+console: CH341 bridge /dev/ttyACM0. Native USB JTAG: /dev/ttyACM1 (unused during test). I2C uses HW I2C0 master + HW I2C1 slave (V2 callback API) ‚Äî no bit-bang needed since S3 has two I2C controllers.

required.label: Wire 1 ‚Äî PCNT pulse out + GPIO interrupt in
Wire 2 ‚Äî UART1 TX ‚Üí UART1 RX loopback
Wire 5 ‚Äî I2C0 SDA master ‚Üî I2C1 SDA slave
Wire 6 ‚Äî I2C0 SCL master ‚Üî I2C1 SCL slave
